query:
SELECT vm.id, vm.variantId, vm.materialColorId, vm.sortOrder, vm.materialType 
FROM variant_materials vm
JOIN product_variants pv ON vm.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V018'
ORDER BY vm.sortOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT vm.id, vm.variantId, vm.materialColorId, vm.sortOrder, vm.materialType 
FROM variant_materials vm
JOIN product_variants pv ON vm.variantId = pv.id
